Colombia vuelve a quedarse corta y el sueño termina en octavos de final | Conexión Mundial
items.summary: Colombia volvió a despedirse antes de los cuartos de final tras caer en penales frente a Suiza. Nuestros expertos debatieron por qué una generación llena de talento no ha logrado dar el salto definitivo desde la histórica actuación en Brasil 2014.

items.title: La Bota de Oro entra en su etapa decisiva con Messi al frente | Conexión Mundial
items.summary: La carrera por la Bota de Oro de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 está más cerrada que nunca. Lionel Messi lidera con ocho goles, mientras Kylian Mbappé y Erling Haaland lo siguen muy de cerca con siete anotaciones, manteniendo abierta la lucha.

items.title: México termina en noveno lugar del Mundial, por encima de Brasil, Alemania y Países Bajos

items.title: Argentina resurge con una remontada histórica y vuelve a ilusionar | Conexión Mundial
items.summary: Repasamos la histórica remontada de Argentina, que pasó de perder 2-0 a vencer 3-2 a Egipto para avanzar a los cuartos de final. Además, analizaron la polémica por el gol anulado a los egipcios y debatieron si la Albiceleste es candidata.

items.title: Todo lo que debes saber del histórico Halftime Show del Mundial 2026
items.summary: Madonna, Shakira, BTS, Justin Bieber y más estrellas protagonizarán el primer Halftime Show de una Final de la Copa Mundial. El espectáculo también impulsará una campaña global para recaudar fondos destinados a la educación infantil.

items.title: ‘Grey’s Anatomy’ star Patrick Dempsey says he won’t run for Senate in Maine

items.summary: Crude oil prices jumped and stock prices fell after President Trump declared an end to the ceasefire with Iran, adding fresh uncertainty to an already shaky outlook for the global economy.

items.title: Family of Nolan Wells, Black teen found dead off Mississippi island, retains lawyer Ben Crump
items.summary: The body of 18-year-old Nolan Xavier Wells was found Monday off Horn Island, Mississippi. That's where he was last seen with friends Saturday. Crump says the family is seeking answers.

items.title: Inspiration for Trump's arch was sparked long before the design was first approved
items.summary: The design process for new memorials shouldn't be fast-tracked or dictated by a select few, experts say. But a small group of people close to President Trump played an outsized role in the arch's quick approvals.

items.title: Sanders, Warren Drop Endorsements of Maine's Graham Platner
items.summary: Maine’s Democratic senate nominee Graham Platner is facing mounting pressure from top Democrats to end his campaign, including from Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders who have released statements calling for him to step aside. It comes amid new nonconsensual sexual conduct allegations which he denies. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

items.title: Charges filed against Indian crime boss in assassination that strained Canada-India ties
items.summary: Authorities have charged the leader of an Indian criminal group in connection with the assassination of a prominent Sikh leader in Canada

items.title: La otra hazaña de Messi: logró que Scaloni festejara un gol por primera vez en el Mundial
items.summary: El DT Campeón del Mundo recconoció no festejar los goles de la "Albiceleste", pero el empate agónico de su capitán ante Egipto lo hizo explotar de júbilo en la banca. Revive cómo vivió el estratega los goles y el final del partido con llanto incluido.

items.title: Suiza hace historia y Colombia se marcha con la frente en alto
items.summary: El DT de Suiza y Rubén Vargas destacaron la mentalidad del equipo tras avanzar en penales ante Colombia. Del lado cafetero, Daniel Muñoz, Quintero y Arias lamentaron la eliminación y agradecieron el apoyo de la afición.

items.title: Radar Mundial: Argentina firma una remontada épica y Suiza elimina a Colombia en penales
items.summary: Argentina remontó un 2-0 ante Egipto con Messi como protagonista y avanzó a cuartos de final. Suiza dejó fuera a Colombia en una dramática tanda de penales y quedaron definidos los ocho mejores del Mundial 2026.

items.title: ¡Argentina avanza con autoridad y Suiza sobrevive en los penales!
items.summary: Argentina superó un complicado duelo ante Egipto para instalarse en los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Suiza, por su parte, venció a Colombia en una dramática tanda de penales y también aseguró su lugar entre los ocho mejores.

items.title: Amargo adiós: así fue la tanda de penales que despidió a Colombia del Mundial ante Suiza
items.summary: Dávinson Sánchez y Cucho Hernández no pudieron convertir sus cobros, mientras que Rubén Vargas cerró la tanda con un derechazo que venció a Camilo Vargas para sellar el pase de los europeos a cuartos y dejar a la "Tricolor" fuera de la Copa del Mundo.

items.title: GOP prepared to block vote to replace Feinstein on Senate Judiciary
items.summary: Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer said on Tuesday that he hopes to replace Democratic Sen. Dianne Feinstein on the Senate Judiciary Committee with Sen. Ben Cardin of Maryland and aims to set up a floor vote on the issue this afternoon, which Republicans are expected to block.

items.title: Supreme Court seems sympathetic to postal worker who didn't work Sundays in dispute over religious accommodations
items.summary: The Supreme Court seemed to side with a former mail carrier, an evangelical Christian, who says the US Postal Service failed to accommodate his request to not work on Sundays.

items.title: Anti-abortion doctors urge Supreme Court to keep mifepristone restrictions in place
items.summary: A group of doctors opposed to abortion asked the Supreme Court Tuesday to restrict access to a key medication abortion drug while other legal challenges play out, as Wednesday night's deadline for the court to act approaches.

items.title: McCarthy makes plea for Republicans to back debt ceiling plan
items.summary: Speaker Kevin McCarthy made a plea to House Republicans during a closed-door meeting Tuesday morning to back his debt ceiling plan, telling them that although it doesn't have to include everything they want, it will help get him to the negotiating table with President Joe Biden.

items.title: Fulton County, Georgia, jail leadership resigns after inmate's death and accusations of unsanitary conditions
items.summary: Three officials at the Fulton County, Georgia, jail have stepped down amid an investigation into the death of an inmate whose family said was housed in a filthy, bug-infested cell that "was not fit for a diseased animal."

items.summary: China's economy is off to a solid start in 2023 following its emergence from three years of strict pandemic restrictions.

items.title: He was free for 2 years. Now Crosley Green is back in prison for a crime he says he didn't commit
items.summary: A Florida man who served three decades behind bars for a murder he says he didn't commit returned to prison Monday after spending the past two years building a life outside prison walls.

items.title: Family of victim and survivors of Indianapolis FedEx mass shooting file lawsuit against gun magazine manufacturer and distributors
items.summary: The family of a victim and several survivors of a mass shooting at a FedEx facility in Indianapolis filed a lawsuit against companies involved in the manufacturing, marketing and sale of the high capacity magazine used by the gunman who killed 8 people and injured several others in 2021.

items.title: McDonald's is upgrading its burgers

items.title: Google-parent stock drops on fears it could lose search market share to AI-powered rivals
